hero.secondary: Stubborn mats, breed-standard grooming or upcoming hygiene care? {entreprise} takes care of your pet with professional, gentle, and guaranteed techniques.

pourquoi.title: Why choose us for grooming?
pourquoi.primary: A serene companion, without fear of the next appointment.
pourquoi.secondary: A neglected coat or stubborn mats is more than a nuisance: it's a risk to your pet's skin health. We step in to restore comfort, hygiene, and well-being to your companion through adapted bathing and drying, and early detection of skin issues.

cartes.title: Mats and tangled coats
cartes.text: Gentle detangling, adapted brushing, and specific baths to restore coat health and beauty without stress.

cartes.title: Breed-standard grooming
cartes.text: Professional clipping and scissor finishing strictly respecting breed standards and your dog's morphology.

cartes.title: Hygiene and annex care
cartes.text: Nail trimming, ear cleaning, anal gland expression, and skin issue detection for overall health.

processus.title: Our grooming process
processus.primary: Simple, transparent, and stress-free: we read your pet's body language to adapt our handling.

cartes.title: Benevolent assessment
cartes.text: Analysis of your companion's coat, skin, and temperament to define the most adapted care.

cartes.title: Clear and personalized quote
cartes.text: Detailed pricing based on breed, size, and coat condition, explained transparently before care begins.

cartes.title: Gentle grooming
cartes.text: Care delivered with patience, gentle handling, and stress management, so your pet leaves clean and soothed.

temoignages.title: Testimonials
temoignages.primary: They trusted us with their pets.

cartes.name: Mathias Ostanel
cartes.text: Grooming of our dog with great gentleness, very clean work and respectful of his stress. Impeccable result!

cartes.name: Elysa Thomas
cartes.text: Unmatched responsiveness and availability. Kind and very professional groomer, my dog came out soothed and beautiful.

cartes.name: Julie Martet
cartes.text: Responsive and professional groomer. The work is neat, the advice for coat maintenance is valuable. I recommend.

cartes.name: Clara Navail
cartes.text: Wonderful experience, serious work, friendly person, quick and painless detangling! A true passionate, everything was top!

cartes.name: Jean Corentin
cartes.text: A true professional! Always takes the time to explain care after grooming. Clean work, spotless, my dog loves going there. Highly recommend!

cartes.name: Ivoa Bille
cartes.text: Probably the best groomer we've had the chance to work with. Very responsive, organized, thoughtful, good advice for the coat, efficient and more...

faq.title: FAQ
faq.secondary: Can't find your answer? Call us, we will always take the time to respond and reassure your pet.

questions.question: Do you serve all of Lot-et-Garonne?
questions.answer: We welcome your companions in our mobile unit and cover all of Lot-et-Garonne.

questions.question: Is the grooming quote really free?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We freely assess your pet's coat condition and needs to provide you with a detailed, no-obligation quote.

questions.question: How do you handle stressed or anxious dogs?
questions.answer: Stress management is our priority. We use gentle handling techniques, take breaks if needed, and read your pet's body language to guarantee a positive, trauma-free experience.

questions.question: Are annex care services (nails, ears, anal glands) included?
questions.answer: Yes, our full grooming packages systematically include ear cleaning, nail trimming, and anal gland expression, performed with delicacy and hygiene.
